html:
Lady is the direwolf of Sansa Stark. Other usages include:

Animals

  • Lady Whiskers, a cat owned by Tommen Baratheon.

Characters

  • Catelyn Stark, a noblewoman known as Lady Stoneheart after her death.
  • Daenerys Targaryen, a noblewoman known as the Silver Lady.
  • Elia Sand, a bastard known as Lady Lance.
  • Lady Farts-a-Lot, the nickname for a member of Rhaena Targaryen's court in Dragonstone.
  • Lady of the Leaves, an old woman from the riverlands.
  • Melisandre, a red priestess of R'hllor known as Lady Red.
  • Myrielle Peake, a noblewoman known as Lady Turnips.
  • Penny, a dwarf woman mocked as Lady Imp.
  • Samwell Tarly, a member of the Night's Watch mockingly called as Lady Piggy.
  • The Veiled Lady, a famous courtesan in Braavos.

Deities

  • Lady of the Waves, a goddess of old worshiped by people of the Three Sisters.
  • The Weeping Lady of Lys, a goddess worshipped in Lys.

Objects

  • Lady Forlorn, the Valyrian steel longsword of House Corbray.
  • Lady Lu, a massive axe.

Ships

  • Iron Lady, a ironborn longship.
  • Lady Bright, a Braavosi trading galley.
  • Lady Harra, a war galley of the royal fleet.
  • Lady Joanna, one of Cersei's dromonds.
  • Lady Lyanna, a war galley of the royal fleet.
  • Lady Marya, a galley in the service of House Seaworth.
  • Lady of Myr, a trading galley.
  • Lady of Silk, a war galley of the royal fleet.
  • Lady of the Tower, a war galley in the service of House Hightower.
  • Lady Olenna, one of Cersei's dromonds.
  • Lady's Shame, a war galley of the royal fleet.
  • Lady Ushanora, a Braavosi trading galley.
  • Lisping Lady, a travelling ship carrying a troupe of mummers.
  • Noble Lady, a great cog.
  • White Lady, a galleas.

Songs

  • My Lady Wife, a romantic song.
